quarantine.mapping: Each fixture path maps to its former tests/ path after removing the quarantine root and final .txt suffix.
quarantine.policy: These exact historical test bytes positively asserted retired identity, frame, egg, browser, Tier 2, or wire behavior. They are non-executable migration evidence and are never RAPP/1 conformance evidence.

active_legacy_inputs.reason: The test rejects any reintroduction of a legacy egg producer in the target-owned planter.
The strict facade tests prove unrecognized legacy request members do not alter semantic request handling.
Exact legacy inputs are rejected or contained while target-owned migration paths remain fail-closed.
Legacy identifiers are parser rejection and bounded migration fixtures, not accepted current identities.
Legacy identifiers exercise explicit migration planning without authorizing provisional persistence.
The strings are forbidden implementation markers that the containment test proves absent.
The string distinguishes labeled historical examples from prohibited current claims.
The PII guard narrowly recognizes historical rappid tokens while continuing to reject ordinary email addresses.
The current static runner proves legacy producer and response-alias markers are absent from active implementations.
